plans.label: HRIS only
plans.description: Standalone HRIS customer — HR + reporting + integrations

plans.label: Spend Management only (standalone)
plans.description: Standalone Spend customer — no HR/Payroll. Spend pillar plus banking and integrations.

plans.label: IT only (standalone)
plans.description: Standalone IT customer — devices, identity, and integrations only.

plans.label: HR + Payroll + Benefits
plans.description: Typical SMB bundle — HR, Payroll, Time, Benefits, plus reporting and integrations.

plans.label: Payroll only (standalone)
plans.description: Standalone Payroll customer. Pay employees and contractors without owning the rest of the HR stack.

plans.label: HR + Payroll + Benefits + Spend
plans.description: SMB bundle that adds Spend Management on top of the HR/Payroll/Benefits/Time stack.
